findings.message: Final third of the agent body is a verbatim design-reviewer template contradicting the declared code-review role
One inline 'For example:' clause only, no structured <example> block
7 vague-quantifier hits ('security-relevant' x7)

coder-reviewer.md, frontend-engineer.md, and ux-designer.md each describe a numbered pipeline position and name collaborators (Security Reviewer, Backend Engineer, Database Engineer, Business Analyst) that do not exist as .claude/agents/*.md files, only as prose under specialized-agents/system-prompts/

Agent body cuts off mid-sentence at the closing directive — tail -c 200 shows the file ends mid-sentence at 'Remember: You are the user advocate' with no further content (wc -l confirms 403 total lines)

Final third of the agent body is a verbatim design-reviewer template contradicting the declared code-review role — Lines 289-328 of coder-reviewer.md are near-verbatim identical to specialized-agents/system-prompts/design-reviewer.md lines 58-98 (Triage Matrix, Report Structure, Playwright MCP toolset)
Command has no YAML frontmatter (no description field) — File begins with '# Five Whys Analysis' — no leading '---' YAML frontmatter block
Command has no YAML frontmatter (no description field) — File begins with '# Create Pull Request Command' — no leading '---' YAML frontmatter block
Command has no YAML frontmatter (no description field) — File begins with '# PR Review' — no leading '---' YAML frontmatter block
Command has no YAML frontmatter (no description field) — File begins with 'This outlines the development practices...' — no leading '---' YAML frontmatter block
Command has no YAML frontmatter (no description field) — File begins with '# LLM Unit Testing Best Practices Checklist' — no leading '---' YAML frontmatter block

Command has no YAML frontmatter and no actionable command body (persona text only) — File begins with '# User Experience Designer & UI Specialist Persona' — no leading '---' YAML frontmatter block, and body has no Usage/steps/output format

Calls Anthropic Messages API to generate a completion message; expected functionality, key only reaches Anthropic's own endpoint — client.messages.create(...) sends prompt_text to Anthropic's API using ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env
Calls OpenAI Chat Completions API to generate a completion message; expected functionality — client.chat.completions.create(...) sends prompt_text to OpenAI's API using OPENAI_API_KEY from env
Calls ElevenLabs TTS API to synthesize and play audio; expected functionality — elevenlabs.text_to_speech.convert(...) sends text to ElevenLabs API using ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
Streams OpenAI TTS audio; expected functionality — openai.audio.speech.with_streaming_response.create(...) streams audio from OpenAI using OPENAI_API_KEY

Hardcoded absolute path leaks the author's local username and breaks on any other machine; every other hook script uses the bare 'uv' command — subprocess.run(["/Users/wesam/.local/bin/uv", "run", tts_script, notification_message], ...)
python-dotenv declared with no version bound — PEP 723 dependencies = ["python-dotenv"] has no version constraint
python-dotenv declared with no version bound — PEP 723 dependencies = ["python-dotenv"] has no version constraint

pyttsx3 declared with no version bound — PEP 723 dependencies = ["pyttsx3"] has no version constraint
